description: Style NoteNow carry your monetary essentials in style with this leather wallet from new hide. The wallets come with a stylish upper and spacious inner making it must-have accessory!Product DetailsBlack two-fold wallet with two main compartmentsMultiple card holders, insert pockets, a zippered pocket in the centre and an id card holder on the leftBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeDimensions: 12 cm x 9 cm
